title: Maximum Value at a Given Index in a Bounded Array
titleCn: 有界数组中指定下标处的最大值

testcases.input: n = 4, index = 2, maxSum = 6 Output: 2 Explanation: nums = [1,2,2,1] is one array that satisfies all the conditions. There are no arrays that satisfy all the conditions and have nums[2] == 3, so 2 is the maximum nums[2].
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: nums = [1,2,2,1] is one array that satisfies all the conditions. There are no arrays that satisfy all the conditions and have nums[2] == 3, so 2 is the maximum nums[2].
